zh.lifeSummary: 當John Jackson於1522年出生在英國林可爾史爾霍爾布林時，他的父親Willam Jackson24歲，母親Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth23歲。他於1584年1月26日與Millisente Gustorde在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾利金哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1607年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾霍爾布林享年86歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Jackson于1522年出生在英国林可爾史爾霍爾布林时，他的父亲Willam Jackson24岁，母亲Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth23岁。他于1584年1月26日与Millisente Gustorde在英国英格兰林可爾史爾利金哈姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1607年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾霍爾布林享年86岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Jackson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish: patronymic from Jack . In North America, this surname has absorbed other patronymics beginning with J- in various European languages, in particular those derived from equivalents or short forms and other derivatives of the personal name Jacob , e.g. Norwegian Jacobsen or Jakobsen and, in some cases, Slovenian Jakše (from a derivative of the personal name Jakob ). This surname is also very common among African Americans (see also 2 below).

African American: from the personal name Jackson (or Andrew Jackson), adopted in honor of Andrew Jackson, the 7th president of the US; or adoption of the surname in 1 above, in many cases probably for the same reason.

History: This extremely common British name was brought over by numerous different bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. One forebear was the father and namesake of the seventh US president, Andrew Jackson, who migrated to SC from Carrickfergus in the north of Ireland in 1765. The Confederate General Thomas ‘Stonewall’ Jackson came from VA, where his great-grandfather John, likewise of Scotch–Irish stock, had settled after emigrating to America in 1748.

variants.name: Jack
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English and Older Scots personal name Jak, Jakke, Jagge, Jake, Jeke, Jegge, a Picard-Flemish denasalized form of Old Picard and Middle Dutch Janke, a pet form of Jan (see John ). It was introduced by Flemings and Picards into Norman and Anglo-Norman usage, whence it became a common English and Scottish pet form of John. Although the surname is mainly Scottish in distribution, it also occurs in England, though the more common form there is Jackson .

English: occasionally perhaps from a Middle English borrowing of the Old French personal name Jacque(s) (James). However, it is uncertain whether English Jack was ever used as an alternative to James.
Native American (e.g. Navajo): adoption of the English personal name Jack (see 1 above) as a surname.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When John Jackson was born in 1522, in Horbling, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Willam Jackson, was 24 and his mother, Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth, was 23. He married Millisente Gustorde on 26 January 1584, in Threekingham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died about 1607, in Horbling, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 86, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Jackson est né en 1522, à Horbling, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Willam Jackson, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Millisente Gustorde le 26 janvier 1584, à Threekingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé environ 1607, à Horbling, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Jackson 1522 in Horbling, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Willam Jackson 24 und seine Mutter Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth 23. Er hat am 26. Januar 1584 in Threekingham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Millisente Gustorde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb um 1607 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Horbling, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Jackson è nato il nel 1522 nel Horbling, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Willam Jackson, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Millisente Gustorde il 26 gennaio 1584, nel Threekingham, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì circa 1607, nel Horbling, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Jacksonが1522年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアホールブリングで生まれた時，父Willam Jacksonは24歳，母Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworthは23歳であった。1584年1月26日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスレエキンガムでMillisente Gustordeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は約1607年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアホールブリングで86歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Jackson(이)가 1522년 영국 링코실르 호르블링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Willam Jackson(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1584년 1월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스리킨그함에서 Millisente Gustorde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1607년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 호르블링에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Jackson nasceu em 1522, em Horbling, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Willam Jackson, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Millisente Gustorde em 26 de janeiro de 1584, em Threekingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1607, em Horbling, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 86 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Jackson родился в 1522 г. в местности хаурблинг, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Willam Jackson было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Millisente Gustorde 26 января 1584 г. в местности трикингхам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер около 1607 г. в местности хаурблинг, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 86 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Jackson nació en 1522, en Horbling, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Willam Jackson, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Millisente Gustorde el 26 de enero de 1584, en Threekingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1607, en Horbling, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
